source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
source.population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.
source.setting: Pituitary incidentaloma clinical evaluation, endocrine testing, imaging, visual assessment, consultation, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Partial for a broad pituitary-symptoms workflow. Exact only for selected headache, visual, endocrine-symptom, hormone-profile, imaging, visual-field, and referral documentation; diagnosis, hormone replacement, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache, visual loss or blurring, diplopia, cranial-neuropathy, fatigue, and altered-mental-status context as clinician-recorded symptoms or prompts.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
source.population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.
source.setting: Pituitary incidentaloma clinical evaluation, endocrine testing, imaging, visual assessment, consultation, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Partial for a broad pituitary-symptoms workflow. Exact only for selected headache, visual, endocrine-symptom, hormone-profile, imaging, visual-field, and referral documentation; diagnosis, hormone replacement, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache, visual loss or blurring, diplopia, cranial-neuropathy, fatigue, and altered-mental-status context as clinician-recorded symptoms or prompts.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped pituitary symptom identity, headache, visual, fatigue, and acute-visual-loss prompt fields.

added_items.final_wording: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
source.population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.

source.exclusions: Partial for a broad pituitary-symptoms workflow. Exact only for selected headache, visual, endocrine-symptom, hormone-profile, imaging, visual-field, and referral documentation; diagnosis, hormone replacement, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-arranged specialist referral documentation with qualifying features retained.

added_items.final_wording: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.
